titles.title: Look What The Lord Has Done

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I remember way back when I was living in darkness, He sent a light around me so I can see my way out, And when the Lamb arose to claim, I clearly saw my name, When I start to think about it, I let out a great, big shout.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Rejoice look what the Lord has done; He drove away the darkness at the rising of the Son; Rejoice, look where He's brought us from, Just stop and think about it, look what the Lord has done.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The enemy is always trying to keep us defeated, He always seems to point us to everything that's going wrong, But if we'll only keep our eyes on the Message He supplies, The joy will begin to swell up, we'll be singing a brand new song.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Look how He saved me, How He'd forgiven me, Power to overcome, Oh look what the Lord has done.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Just stop and think about it, Ain't no doubt about it, Sing Glory Hallelujah, For all He's given to you, Stop and think about it, Look what the Lord has done. (Rejoice!)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Look how He saved me, How He'd forgiven me, Blessed assurance, Total deliverance, Gave me a peace of mind, Filled me with Love Divine, Power to overcome, Oh look what the Lord has done.
